additionalInformation.description: Information about why the updateAllowedCombinations action was successful or failed.

conditionalAccessReferences.description: References to existing Conditional Access policies that use this authentication strength.

currentCombinations.description: The list of current authentication method combinations allowed by the authentication strength.

previousCombinations.description: The list of former authentication method combinations allowed by the authentication strength before they were updated through the updateAllowedCombinations action.
